{{Quote|Great work on those magnetic grapples, Pitor. You could be a Republic ''sharp shooter'' with that accuracy!|[[Rex/Legends|Rex]], to [[Pitor]]|<ref name="Deadly Allies">{{TCWComicCite|6.51|Deadly Allies}}</ref>}}
'''Magnetic grapples''' were [[Magnet/Legends|magnetic]] devices on chains used to secure metal. They launched from [[Hydra craft|hydra-skimmers]] to latch onto and haul in metal for salvaging. They were also used to pick up [[Droid/Legends|droids]] in [[Kligson's Moon/Legends|Kligson's Moon]].

After the battle at the [[Great Pit of Carkoon/Legends|Great Pit of Carkoon]] in the [[Dune Sea/Legends|Dune Sea]] of [[Tatooine/Legends|Tatooine]], [[C-3PO/Legends|C-3PO]] and [[R2-D2/Legends|R2-D2]], whom had fallen into the sand, were recovered with magnetic grapples beneath a [[Skiff/Legends|skiff]].<ref name="ROTJ">{{Film|VI}}</ref>

Magnetic grapples were installed on the base of [[C-22 fragmentation grenade]]. The grapple allowed the [[Grenade/Legends|grenade]] to be placed precisely and used for demolition work.<ref name="EGWT">''[[The Essential Guide to Weapons and Technology]]''</ref>
{{Tech-stub}}
